mapper.sql: select u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.password, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remark from tb_user u
mapper.select: select user_id, user_name from tb_user where user_name = #{userName} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, phonenumber from tb_user where phonenumber = #{phonenumber} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, email from tb_user where email = #{email} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into tb_user( user_id, user_name, nick_name, email, avatar, phonenumber, sex, password, status, create_by, remark, create_time )values( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{phonenumber}, #{sex}, #{password}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update tb_user set status = #{status} where user_id = #{userId}
update tb_user set avatar = #{avatar} where user_name = #{userName}
update tb_user set password = #{password} where user_name = #{userName}
mapper.delete: update tb_user set del_flag = '2' where user_id = #{userId}

update tb_user set del_flag = '2' where user_id in
#{userId}
